# Chart Empire - Core Knowledge Base

> Chart Empire: The Music Label Manager is a free, browser-based music industry management simulation game. Players build a fictional record label, sign generated artists, record and release songs, run radio/press/streaming/playlist/fan-club campaigns, tour, manage cashflow, and compete against AI rival labels on a weekly deterministic chart. No download or account is required; guest careers save locally.

## Detailed Information
For a comprehensive overview including all game mechanics, challenge scenarios, technology stack, and educational content, please refer to the full knowledge base:
https://www.chartempiregame.com/llms-full.txt

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.chartempiregame.com/): overview and play call-to-action.
- [Play](https://www.chartempiregame.com/play): launch a guest career in the browser.
- [Game guide](https://www.chartempiregame.com/guide): how scouting, recording, releases, promotion, charts, and finance work.
- [How the music industry works](https://www.chartempiregame.com/how-the-music-industry-works): educational guide to labels, streaming, radio, press, touring, and fan communities.
- [Music promotion](https://www.chartempiregame.com/music-promotion): release planning and promotion strategy for independent musicians.
- [Challenges](https://www.chartempiregame.com/challenges): ten focused strategy scenarios.
- [Leaderboards](https://www.chartempiregame.com/leaderboards): verified public label rankings.

## Common questions
- Is it free? Yes, completely free with no download. Guest saves are stored locally in the browser.
- How do I start? Open the play page, name your label, choose a market, difficulty, and strategy, then scout and sign your first artist.
- Is it real? No. The simulated music industry, artists, and charts are entirely fictional.
- Are there real partners? Yes, Xing Records (https://www.xingrecords.com) and Indie Music Promotion (https://www.indiemusicpromotion.com) are our partners.
